name: Seihyo Co., Ltd.
summary: Seihyo Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ice creams and frozen desserts in Japan. The company is involved in the manufacture and wholesale of ice creams; and Japanese sweets, such as bamboo dumplings, etc., as well as the purchase and sale of frozen foods, rice cereals, and general foods. It also operates a freezing warehouse. The company was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Niigata, Japan.
